name: verbs
description: An opinionated skill pack for taking software work from ambiguity to verified delivery. Includes 14 composable skills.

interface.shortDescription: Hard-won ways of working, encoded as composable skills for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: An opinionated skill pack for taking software work from ambiguity to verified delivery. Includes 14 composable skills. Marketplace Plugin is recommended for Claude Code and Codex; portable npx installs are hook-free. Hermes supports selective manual import. Skills cover clarification, execution, debugging, UI, review, QA, shipping, cross-model judgment, trust gates, writing, and skill construction.
defaultPrompt: Help me clarify and plan this change.
Review and ship this branch with evidence.
Find the root cause before changing the code.
